arts.ttl: Lazio vs Bodo/Glimt | Europa League | Team News & Probable Lineups
arts.sum: On Thursday, Lazio will try to pull off the unthinkable and qualify for the Europa League semi-final at the expense of Bodo/Glimt, despite losing the first leg by two unanswered goals. The decisive second leg will take place at the Stadio Olimpico in Rome. It kicks off at 21:00 CET.
